title: Momentum Ecosystem Initiative Frontmatter
description: YAML frontmatter shape for an initiative file (initiatives/NNNN-slug.md). The file body is free-form markdown; only the frontmatter block is schema-validated.

id.description: Monotonically-increasing initiative number. Allocated by `momentum ecosystem initiative create`.

slug.description: URL-safe slug used in the filename (NNNN-slug.md) and in session log references.

title.description: Human-readable title. Defaults to slug if not provided.

status.description: Lifecycle state. `closed` requires a non-empty closed date.

closed.description: ISO-8601 date the initiative was closed. Required when status is `closed`.

owner.description: Free-form identifier (GitHub handle, email, or name).

repos.description: Member ids from the ecosystem manifest. Repos contributing to this initiative.
